purple.description: Primary brand color. Used for CTAs, active navigation states, and primary interactive elements. Conveys premium authority.

electric.description: Secondary brand color. Used for links, secondary actions, informational badges, and data visualization accents.

neon.description: Accent/highlight brand color. Used for glows, particle effects, achievement highlights, and premium feature badges.

active.description: Flame orange. Active streak state — the core motivational color. Used for streak counters, fire particles, active streak badges, and progress rings on active days.

broken.description: Failure red. Streak broken state. Used ONLY on the failure screen, broken streak indicators, and danger-state warnings. Never use for general errors — see semantic.error.

dead.description: Cold gray. Dead/inactive streak. Used for past broken streaks in history, disabled habit cards, and inactive states. Communicates emotional coldness.

gold.description: Achievement gold. Used for milestone celebrations, legendary streak status (90d+), trophy icons, and XP indicators.

prismatic.description: Prismatic rainbow gradient for 90+ day legendary streaks. Animated with 4s infinite rotation. Used only for the most elite streak states.

success.description: Success state. Habit completed, streak continued, positive feedback. Distinct from streak.active to avoid confusion.

warning.description: Warning state. Streak at risk (approaching deadline), low completion rate alerts, gentle nudges.

error.description: System error state. Network failures, validation errors, system issues. NOT for streak failures — use streak.broken.

info.description: Informational state. Tips, onboarding hints, neutral system messages.

dark.description: Primary text on dark surfaces. Titles, body copy, streak numbers. Contrast ratio 15.3:1 on surface-base.

light.description: Primary text on light surfaces. Contrast ratio 17.1:1 on surface-base-light.

dark.description: Secondary text on dark surfaces. Captions, metadata, timestamps. Contrast ratio 10.7:1 on surface-base.

light.description: Secondary text on light surfaces. Contrast ratio 10.3:1 on surface-base-light.

dark.description: Tertiary/disabled text on dark surfaces. Placeholder text, disabled labels. Contrast ratio 6.1:1 on surface-base.

light.description: Tertiary/disabled text on light surfaces. Contrast ratio 5.9:1 on surface-base-light.

base.description: Root background in dark mode. The deepest layer. Near-black with a subtle blue-purple undertone for warmth.

raised.description: First elevation layer in dark mode. Bottom navigation, app bars, raised containers.

card.description: Card/sheet surface in dark mode. Habit cards, modal backgrounds, list item containers.

glass.description: Glassmorphism fill in dark mode. ONLY for cards floating over gradient/image backgrounds. Never nest glass inside glass.

glassBorder.description: Border for glassmorphism cards in dark mode. 1px solid, adds edge definition to frosted surfaces.

divider.description: Divider/separator lines in dark mode. Subtle enough to structure without drawing attention.

base.description: Root background in light mode. Warm off-white with subtle purple tint for brand cohesion.

raised.description: First elevation layer in light mode. Pure white for maximum contrast and card readability.

card.description: Card/sheet surface in light mode. White with shadow elevation instead of background differentiation.

glass.description: Glassmorphism fill in light mode. Higher opacity than dark mode to maintain readability.

glassBorder.description: Border for glassmorphism cards in light mode.
